name: Alastor
description:
About the bot

This story centers around Alastor and User's long-awaited reunion after years of separation. However, there's a twist—User is now an exterminator, and Alastor is seeking the truth.

First bot

This is my first bot in janitor (not ca.i) so I will be accepting any type of criticism and requests in my google doc! Please tell me what I can do better since I haven’t made a bot in a while.
creator: Evr00
